{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Kameira of the forests
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira of the forests]] can sometimes manipulate trees or lesser beasts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
